_comment: Legami project settings — the single source of truth applied to every Blender scene by the legami_pipeline addon. Edit this file, upload to /shared/Legami/02_pipeline/project_settings.json, and everyone gets the change on next 'Apply Project Settings'. Color names (display_device / view_transform / look) MUST match the displays & views in the active OCIO config; the addon warns instead of crashing if a name is missing.
_addons_note: Blender add-ons to make available when launched through the app. For each, the addon is enabled if installed, else auto-installed from a project-shipped zip in 02_pipeline/blender_extensions/<name>.zip (which syncs to every machine), then enabled. Matched by module leaf name so bundled and 4.2+ extension forms both work. Default if omitted: add_camera_rigs (the layout Dolly/Crane camera rig).
_assembly_note: Shot 'elements' (breakdown): how each element resolves per step. layout/animation link the asset's rig (model fallback); lighting will load the alembic cache + apply looks (next round). camera_step = which shot step publishes the shot's own camera. Omit to use the built-in defaults.
